description:
Currently MAX_SYSTEM_CONCURRENCY is hard-coded to 2 in libs/types/src/settings.ts. The staging server (125GB RAM, 24 CPUs) can handle 6-10 concurrent agents but is capped at 2.

Make this configurable via environment variable or per-project settings.

Changes needed:
- Add AUTOMAKER_MAX_CONCURRENCY env var support
- Keep DEFAULT_MAX_CONCURRENCY = 1 (safe default)
- Allow MAX_SYSTEM_CONCURRENCY to be overridden per-environment
- Validate: minimum 1, maximum 20
- Log the effective max at startup

Acceptance criteria:
- Local dev defaults to maxConcurrency=1, max=2
- Staging can set AUTOMAKER_MAX_CONCURRENCY=8
- Settings UI reflects the effective cap
- Tests cover env var override logic
